items.title: Red Sox Win Streak Halted At 15, Fall Short Of Franchise Mark In Loss To O's
items.summary: The Baltimore Orioles ended Boston’s franchise record-tying 15-game winning streak.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: ‘People are looking at Scotland for good fun’: Glasgow prepares for Commonwealth Games

items.whyItMatters: Running and athletics widen the page beyond match coverage into performance and training stories.

items.title: Konstas, Kellaway, Patterson named in CA XI to face Bangladesh
items.summary: Rocchiccioli, Philippe, Doran also included for the three-day tour game
